calendar.matters:
Petition By Trustee For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bornstein for and with Aaron Conroy (Beneficiary). Marilyn Putnam (Trustee/Petitioner) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Putnam addressed the issue of fees/billings and explained why she prepared the accounting on behalf of Mr. Wentworth (Former Trustee). Mr. Bornstein expressed concern about the amount of fees. The matter was taken under submission. The Court will reduce fees and set a status hearing on payment of the reserve.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition By Trustee For Instructions
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Continued To Sep-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
